results.title: NUC reaffirms commitment to accelerate innovation enterpreneurship in Nigerian varsities
results.description: The National Universities Commission (NUC) has reaffirmed its commitment to accelerating the development of innovation and entrepreneurship ecosystems across Nigerian universities through strategic international partnerships. The post NUC reaffirms commitment to accelerate innovation enterpreneurship in Nigerian varsities appeared first on Tribune Online .

results.title: Man drowns in Lake Eufaula despite witness' efforts to save him
results.description: A man drowned on Lake Eufaula on Wednesday despite a witness' effort to save him, according to Oklahoma Highway Patrol.

results.title: Patrick Duffy’s steady play earns Nebraska Senior Amateur crown at Tatanka Golf Club
results.description: Omaha’s Patrick Duffy won the Nebraska Senior Amateur championship at Tatanka Golf Club, finishing at even-par 144 to beat a strong field by two strokes after a steady final round.

results.title: Cotton proposes fewer prerequisites for people with disabilities taking subminimum wage jobs
results.description: WASHINGTON -- U.S. Sen. Tom Cotton, R-Ark., wants Congress to make adjustments to a federal workforce program by removing service requirements for some workers with disabilities.

results.title: Man arrested for arson in Roseville, police say
results.description: A man was arrested for allegedly starting a fire last month in Roseville, according to police.

results.title: Ex-captain pleads guilty to drugging, raping US Merchant Marine Academy cadet on cargo ship
results.description: A former cargo ship captain pleaded guilty on Wednesday to drugging and raping a U.S. Merchant Marine Academy cadet.

results.title: Tens of thousands of Argentine soccer fans celebrate their team’s World Cup semifinal victory
results.description: BUENOS AIRES, Argentina (AP) — Tens of thousands of soccer fans flooded the streets of Argentina's capital on Wednesday evening in a collective eruption of ecstasy over their national team’s 2-1 victory over England to reach the World Cup final.
